title: Results | Synnergy Lab
description: Section reserved for real strategic marketing case studies and business-focused outcomes.
heading: Results and cases with business focus
intro: This section is ready to hold real cases that demonstrate impact on leads, conversions, inquiries, or positioning.

sections.title: Context before appearance
sections.body: Each case should explain the starting point, business problem, hypothesis, and actions taken.

sections.title: Useful metrics
sections.body: Social proof should prioritize business indicators over attractive but empty outputs.

sections.title: No inflated claims
sections.body: Until validated material is available, we avoid inventing outcomes or unsupported promises.
